texto: I have a little bit of a pet peeve about how the middle class is depicted in movies. I feel like they tend to be either depicted in a very sentimental way, where everybody has a heart of gold except for the villains you're supposed to hiss at, or there's a sort of indie-style version... When it's done well, it's brilliant, it's 'Blue Velvet.'
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Greg Mottola: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I have a little bit of a pet peeve about how the middle class is depicted in movies. I feel like …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, heart, blue pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e blue.

frase_original: I have a little bit of a pet peeve about how the middle class is depicted in movies. I feel like they tend to be either depicted in a very sentimental way, where everybody has a heart of gold except for the villains you're supposed to hiss at, or there's a sort of indie-style version... When it's done well, it's brilliant, it's 'Blue Velvet.'

texto: I don't like high concept movies very much, and the kind of scripts that I would occasionally get offered tended to be really high concept comedies or romantic comedies. I just don't like it. I like much more realistic movies with actual psychology and behavior in them.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Greg Mottola: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I don't like high concept movies very much, and the kind of scripts that I would occasionally get…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, behavior, movies pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e movies.

frase_original: I don't like high concept movies very much, and the kind of scripts that I would occasionally get offered tended to be really high concept comedies or romantic comedies. I just don't like it. I like much more realistic movies with actual psychology and behavior in them.
